generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input I_M and torque output τ_M for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component with torque output τ_G for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component with torque output τ_out for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of the first vertical axis"
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Joint friction dynamics insights used to adjust robot control parameters"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of simulated and measured data for motion accuracy enhancement"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction dynamics insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight, ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of simulated versus measured data in a unified dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling using Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for multi-physics simulation models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata management",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated display of simulated and measured data",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from gearbox secondary encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data from current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output of permanent magnet synchronous motor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output of gearwheel",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output of cycloidal gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance BDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for asset description",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance IBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for asset description",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent magnet synchronous motor",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of gearwheel",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of cycloidal gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system",
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data flow with live measurements; no specific time rates or frequencies mentioned in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot components, sensors, MQTT data streaming, Simulink simulation models, SysML structural models, AAS, and dashboard for integrated friction analysis and motion control enhancement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage, capturing real-time operational data during robot operation for continuous friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data deviations; no explicit uncertainty quantification, verification, or validation mechanisms detailed beyond this comparison."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow; no network architecture details specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management and SysML for system modeling, aligned with Industry 4.0 standards."
]
